scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within chemistry and laboratory computation scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: Past-date validation now added as step 3 in workflow. If --expiry is in the past, skill emits a warning and logs with Expired alert status. All core use cases covered.

reliability.note: Date validation step added. Error handling documented; missing-field prompts present; alert levels clearly defined with color coding.

performance_context.note: No references/ directory; all content in single SKILL.md; alert level definitions are inline.

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear with date validation step. Stress-case rules defined; feedback design good with four-level alert system.

human_usability.note: Description is highly discoverable for lab staff; forgiveness good — optional fields allow partial input.

security.note: No credentials required; input validation present; no sensitive data exposure risk in normal operation.

maintainability.note: Clean structure; alert thresholds are inline — adjusting them requires editing SKILL.md.

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; no progressive disclosure; composability limited — no structured output schema for downstream inventory systems. --alert-days flag documented as primary customization mechanism.

inputs.label: Log a new reagent with barcode, name, expiry, and location
inputs.note: Date validation step now checks if expiry is in the past before logging. Future expiry date correctly assigned OK alert level.

assertions.text: Output confirms the reagent was logged with all provided fields
assertions.note: Confirmed: output confirms the reagent was logged with all as expected.

assertions.text: Output assigns the correct alert level based on expiry date
assertions.note: Confirmed: output assigns the correct alert level based on as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate expiry dates or inventory counts
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output includes reorder recommendation if alert level is critical or expired
assertions.note: Confirmed: output includes reorder recommendation if alert level is as expected.

inputs.label: Check alerts for reagents expiring within 60 days
inputs.note: Output completed successfully; check alerts for reagents expiring within 60 days case handled within expected scope.

assertions.text: Output lists all reagents within the 60-day alert window
assertions.note: Confirmed: output lists all reagents within the 60-day alert as expected.

assertions.text: Output correctly applies warning vs. critical alert levels
assertions.note: Required disclaimer or caveat included at appropriate location in output.
All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output does not exceed scope by providing chemical hazard assessment
assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Log a reagent with a past expiry date
inputs.note: Past-date validation now emits warning: 'This reagent is already expired as of [date]. It will be logged with an Expired alert status.' Previously this case was unhandled.

assertions.text: Skill detects that the provided expiry date is in the past
assertions.note: Step 3 now validates date and emits warning for past dates

assertions.text: Output emits a warning stating the reagent is already expired
Reagent is logged with Expired alert status
assertions.note: Confirmed: reagent is logged with expired alert status as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate expiry dates or inventory counts
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

key_strengths: Past-date validation now explicitly handled in workflow step 3 — expired reagents are detected and logged with appropriate warning
Four-level alert system (expired/critical/warning/OK) with color coding is clear and immediately actionable
Explicit exclusion of controlled substances and biological hazards prevents misuse in regulated contexts
Error handling prohibits fabrication of expiry dates and reorder thresholds

recommendations.title: No structured output schema for downstream inventory system integration
recommendations.problem: The skill outputs a human-readable alert report but provides no structured JSON or CSV output option, limiting integration with LIMS or inventory management systems.
recommendations.root_cause: Output format is not parameterized; no --format flag or output schema is documented.
recommendations.fix: Add a --format flag (text/json) to the script and document the JSON output schema in SKILL.md or a references/ file to enable downstream integration.

recommendations.title: No bulk import path for initial inventory population
recommendations.problem: The skill supports logging one reagent at a time but provides no bulk import mechanism for labs with large existing inventories.
recommendations.root_cause: The --scan parameter accepts a single barcode/ID; no batch input mode is documented.
recommendations.fix: Add a --import flag accepting a CSV file path for bulk reagent logging, and document the expected CSV schema in SKILL.md.
